api_key.description: Statuspage API key, sent as the Authorization header with an 'OAuth ' prefix (Authorization: OAuth <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Statuspage API base URL override for tests or proxies.

page_id.description: Statuspage page ID that the 'components', 'incidents', and 'subscribers' streams are scoped to (required for those streams; substituted into the page-scoped path). Not required for the 'pages' stream.
